accounts.name: wallet
docs: Must match the seeds — only the profile owner can close it.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The wallet that signs this tx becomes the primary authority.

accounts.name: secondary_authority
docs: New secondary authority (does NOT need to sign — the primary authority is responsible).
Pass `Pubkey::default()` to leave it unset.

accounts.name: platform_treasury_wallet
docs: Wallet from global_config.platform_treasury (SOL + fee destination identity).

accounts.name: platform_treasury_ata
docs: ATA for collateral mint; mint/owner validated in handler.

accounts.name: platform_treasury_wallet
docs: Wallet address that receives the flat SOL fee.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Current authority (primary or secondary) — must sign.

accounts.name: new_authority
docs: The new primary authority after this update.
Does NOT need to sign — pass the same key as `authority` to keep it unchanged.

accounts.name: wallet
docs: The wallet owner — pays rent on first creation, signs all updates.

accounts.name: user_profile
docs: The profile to verify. Must already exist — user must have called
`upsert_user_profile` first. The `target_wallet` key is embedded in the
PDA seeds so the authority must pass the correct account.

accounts.name: target_wallet
docs: The wallet whose profile is being verified (not required to sign).

accounts.name: authority
docs: Platform primary or secondary authority.

errors.name: ConfigUnauthorized
errors.msg: Global config can only be updated by authority

errors.name: MintNotAllowed
errors.msg: Collateral mint is not on the allowlist

errors.name: MarketClosed
errors.msg: Market is closed (early or past close_at)

errors.name: MarketNotClosed
errors.msg: Market is not closed yet

errors.name: MarketAlreadyResolved
errors.msg: Market is already resolved

errors.name: MarketVoided
errors.msg: Market is voided

errors.name: MarketNotVoided
errors.msg: Market is not voided

errors.name: MarketNotResolved
errors.msg: Market is not resolved

errors.name: CannotVoidResolvedMarket
errors.msg: Cannot void an already resolved market

errors.name: InvalidOutcomeIndex
errors.msg: Invalid outcome index

errors.name: NotResolver
errors.msg: Signer is not a resolver for this market

errors.name: OnlyCreatorOrResolver
errors.msg: Only creator or resolver can perform this action

errors.name: InvalidFeeBps
errors.msg: Platform fee + creator fee must not exceed 10000 bps

errors.name: CloseAtMustBeInFuture
errors.msg: Close time must be in the future

errors.name: ZeroMintAmount
errors.msg: Mint amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidResolutionThreshold
errors.msg: Invalid resolution threshold (M must be <= number of resolvers)

errors.name: InvalidTreasuryAta
errors.msg: Platform treasury token account mint or owner does not match global config

errors.name: AlreadyVoted
errors.msg: Resolver has already voted; call revoke_resolution_vote before voting again

errors.name: NotVoted
errors.msg: No active vote to revoke

errors.name: OutcomeTallyOverflow
errors.msg: Outcome tally counter would overflow

errors.name: OutcomeTallyEmpty
errors.msg: Outcome tally counter is zero

errors.name: InvalidMintCompleteSetRemainingAccounts
errors.msg: mint_complete_set: remaining accounts must be [outcome_mint_i, user_ata_i] pairs; len = 2 * outcome_count

errors.name: DisplayNameTooLong
errors.msg: Display name exceeds 50 bytes

errors.name: UrlTooLong
errors.msg: URL exceeds 100 bytes

types.name: AllowedMint
docs: Marker account: existence means this mint is allowed as collateral.

types.name: CloseMarketEarlyArgs
docs: Close the market early. Allowed by market creator or any resolver.

fields.name: num_resolvers
docs: Up to 8 resolver pubkeys, set during initialize_market_resolvers.

types.name: FinalizeResolutionArgs
docs: Check M-of-N using per-outcome tally PDAs and mark the market resolved when threshold is met.
Anyone can call. No-op if already resolved or threshold not met.

fields.name: secondary_authority
docs: Backup authority — same permissions as `authority`. `Pubkey::default()` disables.

fields.name: platform_treasury
docs: Wallet that receives platform token fees (ATA derived per collateral mint).

fields.name: platform_fee_lamports
docs: Flat SOL fee (lamports) per user mint / redeem.

types.name: InitializeMarketMintsArgs
docs: Second step of market creation: initializes the 8 outcome mints.
Decimals are inherited from `market.collateral_decimals` (stored during `create_market`),
so 1 outcome token ≡ 1 collateral token.

types.name: InitializeMarketResolversArgs
docs: Third step of market creation: initializes the 8 resolver PDAs and writes the provided pubkeys.

fields.name: platform_fee_bps
docs: 0 = use global config default

types.name: OutcomeTally
docs: Per-outcome vote counter for resolution (M-of-N). PDA seeds:
`[market, b"outcome-tally", outcome_index]`.

types.name: ResolutionVote
docs: One PDA per resolver slot (`[market, b"vote", resolver_index]`).
A resolver may only have one active vote at a time: vote sets `has_voted`,
revoke clears it so they can vote again (1 → 0 → 1 when changing outcome).

types.name: Resolver
docs: Marker: this pubkey is a resolver for the market.

types.name: RevokeResolutionVoteArgs
docs: Clears a resolver's active vote (1 → 0): decrements the tally for `outcome_index` and
sets `has_voted` false. `outcome_index` must match the stored vote.

fields.name: outcome_index
docs: Must equal the current `resolution_vote.outcome_index` while `has_voted` is true.

fields.name: display_name
docs: Optional display name chosen by the wallet owner. Max 50 bytes UTF-8.

fields.name: url
docs: Optional URL (website / social). Max 100 bytes UTF-8.

fields.name: verified
docs: Set exclusively by the platform authority via `verify_user_profile`.

types.name: VoidMarketArgs
docs: Void the market. Allowed by market creator or any resolver. Rejected if already resolved.

types.name: VoteResolutionArgs
docs: A resolver casts a vote for an outcome. Requires `has_voted == false` on the vote PDA
(first vote or after `revoke_resolution_vote`). Increments the per-outcome tally PDA.

fields.name: resolver_index
docs: Resolver slot index (0..7) for this signer; must match the resolver account at this index.
